scripts.name: Clear Temp Files
scripts.description: Deletes files in the OS temp directory older than a certain amount of days.

scripts.name: List Startup Items
scripts.description: Reports what's configured to launch at system startup (read-only).

scripts.name: Disk Space Report
scripts.description: Reports free/used space per mounted volume (read-only).

scripts.name: Large Files Report
scripts.description: Finds large files under your home folder with the option to select files for deletion.

scripts.name: Browser Cache Report
scripts.description: Estimates local browser cache sizes for common Chromium-based browsers.

scripts.name: Windows Services Report
scripts.description: Lists auto-start Windows services and highlights unsigned-looking paths (read-only).

scripts.name: Network Report
scripts.description: Reports network interfaces, default gateway, and active established connections (read-only).

scripts.name: Delete Selected Files
scripts.description: Deletes specific files selected from the Large Files Report. Not shown as a standalone tool card -- invoked only from within that report's UI.

scripts.name: Clear Browser Cache
scripts.description: Clears cache for one or more browsers found by the Browser Cache Report. Not shown as a standalone tool card -- invoked only from within that report's UI.

scripts.name: Software Uninstaller
scripts.description: Lists installed applications, launches native uninstallers, and scans for leftover folders (Windows).

scripts.name: Launch Uninstaller
scripts.description: Starts the native uninstaller for a selected application. Invoked from the Software Uninstaller report UI.

scripts.name: Remove Leftover Folders
scripts.description: Removes leftover folders selected from the Software Uninstaller report. Invoked from that report's UI.
